title: advance_diversifier_to monotonicity in Rust not SQL — documented correctly
description: advance_diversifier_to enforces monotonicity with a Rust read-then-compare, not SQL max(). The doc comment explains exactly why: 'SQLite max() on TEXT is lexicographic, not numeric' (max('50','200')='50' since '5'>'2'). A future contributor might suggest switching to SQL max() to avoid the separate read. Resist: the TEXT decimal encoding means SQL comparison is wrong for variable-length numbers. The Rust-level check is the only correct approach without changing the column type to INTEGER or zero-padded TEXT.
